body:
Please provide as much information as you can: 

* **Suggested term label:Ferritin-specific autophagy**


* **Definition (A ferritin-specific autophagic pathway leading to the release of the iron stored inside ferritin.)**


* **Reference, in format PMID:38714719, 25327288, 26436293**
(REQUIRED)

* **Gene product name and ID to be annotated to this term: FTH1, NCOA4**


* **Parent term(s): GO:0006914 - Autophagy**


* **Children terms (if applicable)** Should any existing terms that should be moved underneath this new proposed term?


* **Synonyms (ferritinophagy - exact)**

* **Cross-references**
* For enzymes, please provide RHEA and/or EC numbers. 
* Can also provide MetaCyc, KEGG, Wikipedia, and other links.

* **Any other information**

comments.body:
Adding with parent "macroautophagy"
and as ferritinophagy
exact synonym ferritin-specific autophagy

standardized def
The selective degradation of ferritin to release iron by macroautophagy.

🤖 Working on it...

Follow along: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/25117814462)

*— @dragon-ai-agent*

title: NTR: [Ferritin-specific autophagy]
